channel.title: Arrays on Built by Nikhil
channel.description: Recent content in Arrays on Built by Nikhil

item.title: Day 5: Three LEDs — Dance, Chase, and Random
item.description: Day 5 of Learn Coding with Arduino — wire up 3 LEDs and control them as a group. Chaser patterns, random blinks, and the trick of looping over pin numbers.

item.title: Day 17: Build an LCD Menu You Can Navigate
item.description: Day 17 of Learn Coding with Arduino — build a scrollable menu on the 16x2 LCD. Two buttons: one to cycle through options, one to select. Arduino gets a real user interface.
